items.title: Is Himalayan salt good for your face?

expanded_element.title: 11 surprising benefits of Himalayan salt for the skin - Alyaka.com
expanded_element.description: Himalayan salt can be used in a number of different ways to benefit the skin. It can be used as an exfoliant, cleanser, or toner. It is also believed to help improve circulation and detoxify the skin. This salt can be used to treat a variety of skin conditions, including acne, eczema, psoriasis, and even dandruff.

items.title: What do Himalayan salt stones do for a massage?

expanded_element.title: Experience the Healing Power of Himalayan Salt Stone Massage
expanded_element.description: By reducing tension and inducing relaxation, Himalayan Salt Stone Massage can improve sleep quality. Clients often report deeper and more restful sleep following a session. The slightly coarse texture of the salt stones provides gentle exfoliation, removing dead skin cells and leaving the skin smooth and revitalized.

items.title: What kind of salt do you use for salt therapy?

expanded_element.title: Halotherapy - Salt Therapy for your Health - Durham Salt Cave
expanded_element.description: What kind of salt is used? To protect everyone's lungs, we use pharmaceutical-grade pure sodium chloride (99.96% NaCl, salt). Normal table salt has other contaminants in it that can harm the lungs.
